purpose: Final profile coverage repair narrows profile evidence onto focused profile endpoints and adds manual phase-06 test proof.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj` now centralizes the profile-specific back-route decision, placeholder action message, and logout transition state, while `renderProfileRoute` preserves the visible back affordance, static action cards, and logout button. `bootstrap_page.cj` delegates the profile logout flow to the focused profile transition endpoint before routing to onboarding after session logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `Profile.kt` owns the back icon, edit/action-card click surfaces, and logout navigation callback.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::resolveBackRoute`, `::canNavigateBack`, `::buildLogoutTransition`, and `::placeholderActionMessage` now carry the profile-specific command wiring instead of closing the row through only the broad bootstrap shell.

`profile_page.cj::buildProfileTopBar` and `::renderProfileRoute` preserve the visible back/logout/action-card surface while `profile_store.cj::logoutRoute` and `::actionFeedbackMessage` keep the route/message state explicit.
Phase-06 manual test reproduction PASS: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` succeeded from `entry/src/test/cangjie` with the recorded env overlay on 2026-06-28.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.
tests: Manual 2026-06-28 reproduction: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` with the phase-06 env overlay

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj` now owns the profile-specific callback decisions for back eligibility, placeholder action feedback, and logout transition state, while `profile_store.cj` centralizes the static identity and placeholder-action message. `renderProfileRoute` remains a thin UI surface over those focused state endpoints without inventing editable or remote profile data.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed the profile screen is driven by callback wiring rather than editable form state or remote data streams.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj`, `profile_store.cj`, and `profile_page.cj::renderProfileRoute` now carry the translated profile callback/state surface more precisely than the root bootstrap shell alone.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` now owns the translated profile-route teardown state, while `resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the post-logout entry behavior that returns the app to onboarding.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` contains no initialization or resume logic beyond logout handling.
Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` captures the translated route teardown state and `resolveStartRoute(false)` returns the onboarding route.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_store.cj::logout` preserves the translated persisted-session mutation, `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition` captures the immediate local route-state reset, and `resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the resulting onboarding entry state after logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` performs a single logout state mutation followed by the supplied callback.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_store.cj::logout`, `profile_route_service.cj::buildLogoutTransition`, and `app_router.cj::resolveStartRoute` now separate the translated mutation, local reset, and startup-resolution responsibilities.
